article_meta.title: Democracy Dies in DarknessPoliticsDonald TrumpWhite HouseDemocracy in AmericaCourts & LawNational SecurityElectionsPolit

reasoning: The model committed an attribution error by flagging a quoted expert phrase as author bias and included a questionable 'Bias by Omission' claim. It did flag one genuine author-level emotionally loaded sentence but missed at least one other defensible author-prose bias instance.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged Seth Stoughton's quoted language ('egregiously deviating...') as author bias, violating the attribution rule.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: 2 of 3 items are not genuine author-level bias: one is purely quoted text; another claims Bias by Omission where the article does include official responses and caveats.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear author-level framing such as the headline/deck phrase 'raise red flags' (author voice) that signals evaluative slant.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: For the one valid author-level instance ('mounting public outrage... militarized tactics'), the label Sensationalism/Emotionalism is defensible.
